[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111000000 3
1 010110011 5
2 110011111 7
3 110011101 6
4 111111101 8
5 111111111 a
6 111111110 8
7 111101000 5

01 10 110011101 6 match 3
12 21 111111101 8 match 4
23 32 111111111 a match 5
34 43 111111110 8 match 6
45 54 111101000 5 match 7
56 65 111110011 7
67 76 010110111 6
70 07 110011111 7 match 2

02 20 111111001 7
13 31 011011110 6
24 42 111101001 6
35 53 111010110 6
46 64 111111011 8
57 75 111010110 6
60 06 110111011 7
71 17 010011110 5

03 30 101011111 7
14 41 111111100 7
25 52 111101001 6
36 63 011110111 7
47 74 111111110 8 match 6
50 05 111011001 6
61 16 010111111 7
72 27 111111111 a match 5

04 40 111111001 7
15 51 111011100 6
26 62 111111011 8
37 73 011010110 5
